title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyan
desc: Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

title: Jagadhatri
desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

title: Bhabi Ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: In this hilarious comedy, two neighboring couples, the Mishras and the Tiwaris, navigate the chaos that ensues when each husband develops a crush on the other's wife!

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Reet, a determined journalist, navigates the struggles of her 'atta-satta' marriage, uncovering family secrets and challenging societal norms in her quest for justice and true love.

title: Vasudha
desc: Vasudha, a cheerful maid, joins business leader Chandrika's home. Despite differing beliefs, she seeks Chandrika's approval and struggles to fit into her elite world.

title: Jagadhatri
desc: Jagaddhatri, a secret crime officer, and orphan Swayambhu partner to fight crime. Only a few friends know her real identity; later, they marry happily.

title: Lakshmi Nivas
desc: Lakshmi, a strong-willed woman, bravely faces pressures in a traditional joint family and stays by her husband Shriniwas, who works hard to build his dream house.

title: Saru
desc: A kabaddi champion from Rajasthan moves to Mumbai to chase her dreams. Along the way, she reunites with her family and fights hard to earn her mother the respect she truly deserves.
